/usr/local/cuda-12.2/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler --use_fast_math -O3 -DNDEBUG "--generate-code=arch=compute_52,code=[compute_52,sm_52]" -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink --options-file CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/deviceObjects1.rsp -o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/cmake_device_link.o
